items.title: Philip Erdoes, Entrepreneur and Venture Capitalist, Dies at 62
items.description: Among other things, the New York-based investor was a co-founder and CEO of a company that provides AI tools.

items.title: Why Analysts See The Synthomer (LSE:SYNT) Story Shifting After JPMorgan’s Lower Target
items.description: JPMorgan’s decision to trim its Synthomer price target to £1.02 from £1.12, while keeping a Neutral rating, shifts the story around the shares without pushing you toward a clear bullish or bearish camp. The move suggests analysts are taking a more cautious view on what the stock might be worth, even though they still see the business as capable of supporting the new target under updated revenue assumptions. Stay with this article to see how you can keep on top of future changes in this...

items.title: More Bonds Are Teetering on the Brink of Junk: Credit Weekly
items.description: The first full week of the year has been one of the busiest for US corporate debt sales on record, and risk premiums stayed low even amid heavy issuance.  Around $63 billion of US corporate bonds in the high-grade universe have a high-yield rating from one bond grader, a BBB- rating from others, and at least one negative outlook, according to the bank’s review based on ratings for debt in its high-grade US index.  “As companies continue to refinance debt, the pressure on their balance sheets from rising interest expense is growing,” said Nathaniel Rosenbaum, a US high-grade credit strategist at JPMorgan.

items.title: Jim Cramer on JPMorgan: “You Wait for the Reaction to Jamie’s Cautious Commentary to Give You a Better Entry Point”

items.title: How Shifting Analyst Targets Are Rewriting The Story For London Stock Exchange Group (LSE:LSEG)
items.description: London Stock Exchange Group has seen its central fair value estimate reaffirmed at £122.84 per share, even as the underlying assumptions behind that figure have been fine tuned. These adjustments reflect how recent Street research is weighing upbeat and cautious views on the company into a single, updated target.
